mapper.select: SELECT h.h_code, r.r_code, rb.rb_score FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON rb.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code
SELECT h.h_code, r.r_code, AVG(rb.rb_score) as 'scoreAvg' FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON rb.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code GROUP BY h.h_code,r.r_code

SELECT COUNT(rb.rb_score) as 'reviewCount', AVG(rb.rb_score) as 'scoreAvg', MIN(r.price) as 'minPrice' FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON rb.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code WHERE h.h_code = #{hotelcode} GROUP BY h.h_code
SELECT h.h_code, AVG(rb.rb_score) as hotelAvg, COUNT(*) as scoreCount FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON r.r_code = rb.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code GROUP BY h.h_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviewboard(rb_score, m_code, r_code, re_code) VALUES(#{rb_score}, #{m_code}, #{r_code}, #{re_code})
mapper.select: SELECT *FROM reviewboard ORDER BY rb_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviewboard
m_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
r_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
rb_score LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")

SELECT * FROM reviewboard
m_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
r_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
rb_score LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
ORDER BY rb_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE reviewboard SET rb_score = #{rb_score} WHERE re_code = #{re_code}
